scripts.check:assets: node tools/check_facecap_asset.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_gnm_eyes.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_skin_material.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_head_pose.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_face_alignment.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_web_identity.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_web_expression.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_full_expression_state.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_identity_transition.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_presets.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_manual_joints.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_motion_edit.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_mouth_retarget.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_recording_pipeline.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_output_owner.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_pause_resume.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tools/check_fullscreen_controls.mjs
